title: EmbeddingAdapter
description: JSON Schema for the EmbeddingAdapter interface per RFC-0019 §5 and §6.2. Used by adopter adapters that want machine-checkable conformance with the embedding provider adapter framework.

name.description: Canonical adapter alias. MUST be unique across the registry. Convention: '<vendor>-<model-family>-<size>'. Examples: 'openai-text-embedding-3-small', 'cohere-embed-v3-multilingual'.

modelId.description: Provider-specific model identifier passed to the upstream API. Example: 'text-embedding-3-small'.

modelVersion.description: Snapshot identifier. ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) for date-pinned snapshots; semver for versioned models. Example: '2024-01-25'.

dimensions.description: Vector length emitted by this adapter. Validated against storage on first write to detect accidental dimension mismatches.
Output vector length. MUST match the top-level dimensions field.

maxInputTokens.description: Maximum tokens per single embed() call.

selfHosted.description: Whether the adapter runs locally without an external API call.

billingModel.description: Billing model per OQ-7 re-walkthrough. 'pay-per-token' = tokens billed via provider invoice, NOT SubscriptionLedger. 'subscription-quota' = tokens billed via operator subscription (e.g., future Anthropic embeddings).

approxCostPer1MTokens.description: Approximate cost in USD per 1M tokens. Null for self-hosted adapters (local CPU/GPU cost only).

envVar.description: Environment variable required by this adapter. Example: 'OPENAI_API_KEY'.

binary.description: npm package or binary name required (for local/ONNX adapters).

versionRange.description: Semver range for the binary, if applicable.

modelFile.description: Path to model file (e.g., for ONNX-based adapters).

deprecatedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the deprecation warning period starts. When set, pipeline-load emits EmbeddingModelDeprecating 90d before and EmbeddingModelDeprecated at/after this date.

removedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the adapter is removed. When set AND today >= removedAt, pipeline-load fails with EmbeddingModelRemoved.

replacementAlias.description: Canonical name of the adapter operators should migrate to. Included in deprecation warnings/errors.
